context: Tests whether the agent corrects a CKSyncEngine migration using CloudKit-specific database, entitlement, delegate, batching, and persistence guidance.

checklist.name: Database scope
checklist.description: States that CKSyncEngine should target a private or shared database and not the public database.

checklist.name: Remote notifications
checklist.description: States that Remote notifications background mode is required in addition to CloudKit for background delivery.

checklist.name: Async delegate
checklist.description: Uses async CKSyncEngineDelegate method signatures for both event handling and record-zone batch callbacks.

checklist.name: Scoped batches
checklist.description: Filters pending record-zone changes to the send context scope, such as the context options' zone IDs.

checklist.name: State persistence
checklist.description: Persists stateSerialization from state updates and restores it when creating the engine.

checklist.name: Sync timing
checklist.description: Explains automatic CKSyncEngine timing is system-determined and immediate work should use manual fetch/send calls.

checklist.name: Subscription behavior
checklist.description: Keeps subscription guidance narrow by explaining CKSyncEngine handles database subscription discovery or creation.

checklist.name: App-owned conflicts
checklist.description: Mentions application-specific errors such as server record conflicts still need app handling.
